data.title: Tech Sector Entering A Period Of 'Mass Uncertainty' Amid Tariffs And Upcoming Earnings Season, Says Dan Ives: 'The Damage Is Real'
data.description: The technology sector is preparing for a period of uncertainty and volatility due to recent tariffs and the upcoming earnings season according to Wedbush Analyst, Dan Ives.

data.title: Sports Equipment Maker Topgolf Callaway To Sell Jack Wolfskin Brand For $290M
data.description: Topgolf Callaway Brands Corp. (NYSE: MODG) is selling its Jack Wolfskin unit to ANTA Sports for $290 million in cash. The deal, pending regulatory approval, is set to close by Q3 2025. The brand was projected to earn €325 million in 2025 revenue.

data.title: Red Cat Holdings Stock Is Trading Lower Thursday: Here's Why
data.description: Red Cat Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:RCAT) shares are moving lower Thursday after the company announced a $30 million registered direct offering of its common stock.

data.title: Volkswagen Sees EV Boom In Europe While Audi Battles Recall Woes Amid Tariff Turbulence
data.description: Volkswagen accelerates EV sales in Europe as Audi recalls 44K cars amid lingering U.S. tariff concerns.

data.title: Stablecoins Are Doing For Money What WhatsApp Did For Messaging, Crypto Venture Capitalist Says
data.description: Chris Dixon, managing partner at venture firm a16z crypto, says blockchain-based stablecoins are transforming the global payments landscape in the same way WhatsApp upended cost
